@graph.name: Stablecoin Spread Analyzer (Bear Markets)
@graph.description: Incorporates Análisis de despegue (de-pegging) — data Google's AI cannot synthesize in real time

mainEntity.name: What is a stablecoin spread analyzer (bear markets)?

acceptedAnswer.text: A free interactive tool that helps traders and analysts use the stablecoin spread analyzer (bear markets) in real time, incorporating análisis de despegue (de-pegging) for accurate results.

mainEntity.name: Is this tool free to use?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, completely free — no account, no credit card, no limits. The tool runs 100% in your browser.

mainEntity.name: How often is the data updated?

acceptedAnswer.text: Calculations update instantly as you change inputs. For market-linked data, we pull from public APIs on page load.

mainEntity.name: What makes this tool different from generic calculators?

acceptedAnswer.text: This tool incorporates análisis de despegue (de-pegging), which most generic calculators ignore, giving you significantly more accurate projections.
